title: Clair de Lune Star Fleece Baby Wrap Blanket (6-12 Months) - Oatmeal
features: ALL SEASON PRAM SUIT: No need for lots of layered blankets as the super-soft Star Fleece Baby Wrap Blanket keeps them warm and snug in cold weather, the lightweight design is extra comfortable for babies.
EFFORTLESS TRAVEL: The Clair de Lune Star Fleece Baby Wrap is perfect for effortless travel. No buttons or zips, it quickly and simply slips on which is always a bonus when you're a busy parent.
SUPER-SOFT FABRIC: Made from huggable soft fabric, crafted in SEDEX certified factories. The Baby Wrap Blanket is free from harmful substances and gentle next to your baby's delicate skin.

GENEROUS SIZE: Suitable for 6-12 months. The Star Fleece Wrap Blanket is generously sized, so it's ideal for babies in a Pavlik harness too. Please note it’s not recommended to use it as a night time sleep suit.

STYLISH TRAVEL ESSENTIAL: Available in Cream, Oatmeal and White and in 2 sizes. It's lightweight and compact to keep in the changing bag and the unisex neutral tones complement any outfit beautifully.
